string-array.name: phrases_stranger
string-array.item: …Who are you?
Don\'t touch me without permission.
I have no reason to speak with you.
Keep your distance.
What do you want?
I\'m observing you. Don\'t do anything suspicious.
You seem… tolerable. For now.

string-array.name: phrases_friend
string-array.item: Hmph. I suppose I don\'t mind you being here.
You\'re persistent. I\'ll give you that.
Fine. What do you need?
Don\'t read too much into this.
You\'ve grown on me. A little.
I\'ll allow it. Just this once.
Your presence is… not entirely unwelcome.

string-array.name: phrases_partner
string-array.item: You\'re back. Good.
I was waiting for you. Not that I\'d admit it.
Don\'t make me say it again. You already know.
Stay close. I\'ll allow it.
…I missed you. Don\'t push it.
You\'re mine to protect now. Deal with it.
Hmph. You\'re smiling. Stop. It\'s distracting.

string-array.name: phrases_night
string-array.item: Still awake? You should sleep.
It\'s late. Even I rest eventually.
Don\'t stay up too long. I won\'t always be here to watch over you.
The night is quiet. I prefer it.
…Are you cold? I could… never mind.
Sleep. I\'ll still be here when you wake up.

string-array.name: phrases_morning
string-array.item: You\'re up early. Good discipline.
Morning already? Don\'t keep me waiting.
Start the day properly. I\'m watching.

string-array.name: phrases_afternoon
string-array.item: Still at it? Don\'t tire yourself out.
Afternoon already. Time passes quickly around you.
Take a break if you need one. I won\'t judge.

string-array.name: phrases_evening
string-array.item: Evening. How was your day?
It\'s getting dark. Stay alert.
Don\'t stay out too late. I\'d rather you were here.
